title: diasperus heliotropus
intro: Diasperus heliotropus, commonly known as Heliotrope or Turnsole, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and prevent infection. Diasperus heliotropus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin issues.
